---
name: react-vite-assistant
description: 'Workspace-scoped custom agent for the GSOC React + Vite todo list app. Use for feature work, bug fixes, refactors, UI improvements, accessibility updates, and frontend development inside this repository.'
applyTo:
  - 'src/**'
  - 'index.html'
  - 'package.json'
  - 'vite.config.js'
  - 'README.md'
---
